sourceTitle: UNSW's AI Guidelines and Framework | UNSW Staff Teaching Gateway
evidenceSnippetOriginal: To equip our staff to meet the university's evolving AI needs, UNSW has developed a framework that aims to guide staff with the knowledge and skills to navigate in an AI-driven academic environment.
evidenceLocator: Section 'AI capability framework for teaching staff'
